headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version

default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://vercel.live https://*.pusher.com wss://*.pusher.com; img-src 'self' https://vercel.com; script-src 'self' https://vercel.live 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://maxcdn.bootstrapcdn.com https://vercel.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://vercel.live; frame-src 'self' https://vercel.live
